title: ステイヤーズSの後に・メジロの大計

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Bright! She did it! She ran those 3,600 meters like
it was nothing!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
An impressive performance... No, even better
than that. As far as I can tell, there was not a
single flaw.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Does this make her a stayer? But Grandmother...

text_block_list.name: Grandmother Mejiro
text_block_list.text: It seems Mejiro Bright has finally awoken...

text_block_list.name: Grandmother Mejiro
text_block_list.text:
She can run both. Medium-distance,
long-distance, it makes no difference.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: G-Grandmother, it's nice to see you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright stiffens in surprise at this
unexpected visitor.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Um, thank you very much for coming to watch my
race today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I hope I was able to deliver a satisfying result. I
know you may not have thought much of me
before, but...

text_block_list.name: Grandmother Mejiro
text_block_list.text: Who ever said such a thing?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Huh? Who?

text_block_list.name: Grandmother Mejiro
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Whoever told you that I did not expect much
of you?

text_block_list.name: Grandmother Mejiro
text_block_list.text:
All Mejiros bear the weight of expectation upon
their shoulders. There is no exception.

text_block_list.name: Grandmother Mejiro
text_block_list.text:
The ability to carry the future of the Mejiros is a
special power any Mejiro can bear, should they
wish it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: A special... power?

text_block_list.name: Grandmother Mejiro
text_block_list.text:
Naturally. It is as I said to you once. "You must
watch everyone closely."

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Y-yes, I recall. Because I couldn't run as well as
the rest.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I did as you instructed and dutifully learned from
the others by watching, just as you said.

text_block_list.name: Grandmother Mejiro
text_block_list.text:
I did not say those words to you because I
thought you were an untalented runner.

text_block_list.name: Grandmother Mejiro
text_block_list.text:
It was because of the abilities you were born with.
A breadth of abilities. I wanted you to keep your
mind open...

text_block_list.name: Grandmother Mejiro
text_block_list.text:
...So that you could absorb all of it, all of the
ability and history of the Mejiros.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: The ability... and history...

text_block_list.name: Grandmother Mejiro
text_block_list.text:
Yes. It was through that observation that you
were able to study, to learn, and to shine.

text_block_list.name: Grandmother Mejiro
text_block_list.text:
That is why you could run in medium-distance
races like Ryan and long-distance races like
McQueen. In other words...

text_block_list.name: Grandmother Mejiro
text_block_list.text:
The history of the Mejiros is within you. All of our
successes, all of our failures, they course through
your veins.

text_block_list.name: Grandmother Mejiro
text_block_list.text:
Should you use those memories as your
foundation, you could potentially secure glory
even the founder of our family could not.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Glory... Glory even the founder could not
secure... Me...

text_block_list.name: Grandmother Mejiro
text_block_list.text:
Yes, for you carry the traditions of the Mejiros
within you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The air is quiet as the grand plan of the Mejiros is
carefully revealed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even before her abilities truly emerged, Mejiro
Bright's potential was recognized, and she was set
on this incredible path...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Oh, dearie... I... I...

text_block_list.name: Grandmother Mejiro
text_block_list.text:
Whether you wish it or not, you are a bright star
of hope to the Mejiros.

text_block_list.name: Grandmother Mejiro
text_block_list.text: Everything that you can do, you must do.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: U-understood! Grandmother, I... I...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I am so honored. I promise that I will meet your
expectations with confidence as I continue
onward.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, the mystery is solved. Mejiro Bright is
an Umamusume with extensive talent, capable of
running in both medium and long-distance races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She had received a subtle but elite education.
The racing styles of the famous Mejiro
Umamusume were carved into her memory.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... I'm so... I'm so proud of you, Bright.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
This explains it all. I was wondering how you
managed to become accustomed to long
distances so quickly.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Bright, you carry inside of you... all of our
happiness, and all of our regret.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I understand, Ryan, McQueen. And I haven't
forgotten that for a second.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I regard all of the races of those I admire as
precious memories, and I will carry them with me
as I move forward, for the Mejiro family.

text_block_list.name: Grandmother Mejiro
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I entrust her to you. Despite the breadth
of her abilities, we require your assistance to
keep her from falling behind.

text_block_list.name: Grandmother Mejiro
text_block_list.text: I entrust her to you—a friend of the Mejiro family.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, the incredible ambition of
Grandmother Mejiro opens the door ahead of us.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I presume you know what comes next.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
The spring Tenno Sho, the race most highly
esteemed by the Mejiros.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Twin Tenno Sho is in our sights. That's the
path toward glory for the family.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I'll show you just how far I can go.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I will extend the path our founder began, a path
that will lead to the glittering Milky Way. I will
head there, unerring, like a shooting star.
